---
title: 'Invited Paper: Learned In-Sensor Visual Computing: From Compression to Eventification'
author:
- Yu Feng
- Tianrui Ma
- Adith Boloor
- Yuhao Zhu
- Xuan Zhang
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/iccad23.pdf
journ: ICCAD
year: 2023
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 74
---
